title: Citrusy Fish Bites
description: A simple and delicious Japanese-inspired dish featuring crispy fish bites with a tangy citrus flavor.
instructions: 1. Cut fish fillets into small bite-sized pieces.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together citrus marinade ingredients.
3. Add fish pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat.
4. Let it marinate for at least 15 minutes.
5. In a separate dish, mix together panko breadcrumbs and a pinch of salt.
6. In a third dish, beat the egg.
7. Dip each fish piece into the flour, then the egg, and finally the panko breadcrumbs.
8. Heat a non-stick pan with about 1/2 inch of oil over medium-high heat.
9. When the oil is hot, add a few fish pieces to the pan and cook until golden brown.
10. Flip the fish over and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
11. Repeat with the remaining fish pieces.
